title: How Anthropic Employees ACTUALLY Use Claude Code to Grow
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes Anthropic's growth strategy using Claude Code across four approaches: automating workflows, enabling previously sub-threshold work, building niche tools, and using AI as thought partner. He highlights how Claude Code transformed Anthropic's growth team's productivity during their $1B to $19B expansion in 14 months.
